mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NF_TRADINFO_HIST_MGT( CUST_NO, TRAD_NO, TRAD_HIST_SEQ, BIZ_TYPE, CALL_CNTR_STS_CD, PRGRSS_STS_CD, BLK_CLERK_NO, APPRVER_CLERK_NO, INIT_REGIST_DT, PRE_LOAN_MOVE_YN, HQ_PRIME_RATE_APPLY_YN, TRAD_REG_GB ) SELECT CUST_NO, TRAD_NO, (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRAD_HIST_SEQ)+1,0) AS TRAD_NO FROM NF_TRADINFO_HIST_MGT WHERE CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND TRAD_NO = #{tradNo} ) AS TRAD_HIST_SEQ, BIZ_TYPE, CALL_CNTR_STS_CD, PRGRSS_STS_CD, COALESCE(BLK_CLERK_NO, '') AS BLK_CLERK_NO, COALESCE(APPRVER_CLERK_NO, '') AS APPRVER_CLERK_NO, CURRENT TIMESTAMP AS INIT_REGIST_DT, PRE_LOAN_MOVE_YN, HQ_PRIME_RATE_APPLY_YN, TRAD_REG_GB FROM NF_TRADINFO_MGT WHERE CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND TRAD_NO = #{tradNo}
